author: gb9t
content: Iteration 29: ath/ath11k.md committed (4650668, 245 lines). Qualcomm Atheros WiFi 6/6E — TP-Link/Linksys/Synology APs + Pixel 5+ phones + ChromeOS + Snapdragon-X laptops. ~61500 LOC / 33 files. Multi-transport architecture (PCIe + AHB + MHI). Rust translation: ath11k-core + per-transport sub-crates + ath11k-wmi typed cmd/event. Grsec: same RF trust boundary as iwlwifi + multi-bus extras — QMI msg validation (closes 'compromised modem-FW pushes garbage QMI to WiFi' cross-domain attack unique to Snapdragon), HAL SRNG head/tail validation in hot path (closes 'compromised FW writes huge head ptr' OOB class), CFR/Spectral CAP_SYS_ADMIN-gated (gait detection / presence sensing privacy concern). 29 docs / ~1.80M LOC. WiFi coverage: Intel iwlwifi + Qualcomm ath11k. Next iteration: drivers/net/wireless/mediatek/mt76 (MediaTek WiFi — second-most-deployed WiFi silicon after Realtek; every cheap consumer router).
